description: Style NoteThe name van heusen is synonymous with style and can be relied upon to craft a timeless formalwear collection. Each piece is sure to add a touch of class to your wardrobe, including this skirt. Pair it with a dark satin blouse and wear a light coloured scarf to give yourself a formal makeover. Black high heels and chic accessories will suffice to complete the look.Product DetailsBlack formal skirt, flare cut, concealed zip along the sideMaterial and CarePolyester, viscose, lycra blendMachine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry lowWarm ironSize and FitRegular fit, stretchThe model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size 28 Style NoteThe name Van Heusen is synonymous with style and can be relied upon to craft a timeless formal wear collection.
